opinion.h4: MILNE v. RHODE ISLAND. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF RHODE ISLAND. No. 989. Decided May 27, 1963.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
GONZALEZ ET AL. v. CITY OF CHICAGO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF ILLINOIS. No. 984. Decided May 27, 1963.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Frederic D. Houghteling, George W. Overton, F. Raymond Marks, Jr. and Donald Page Moore for appellants.
John C. Melaniphy, Milton P. Webster, Jr. and Albert E. Jenner, Jr. for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
